channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: tech
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: tech

item.title: AI Technology Advancements: A Look at the Future - Fox News
item.description: Stay up to date on the latest AI technology advancements and learn about the challenges and opportunities AI presents now and for the future with Fox News.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Microsoft employees protest at 50th anniversary party over Israel contract
item.description: A pro-Palestinian protest by Microsoft employees interrupted the company’s 50th anniversary celebration Friday, the latest backlash over the tech industry’s work to supply artificial intelligence technology to the Israeli military.
item.dc:creator: MATT O'BRIEN, Associated Press, NewsNation

item.title: Intel's Superfluid Cooling Revolution: A Game-Changer for Next-Gen AI Chips
item.description: Intel expands its liquid cooling tech to support Nvidia’s future AI chips, targeting 1.5kW heat loads and positioning itself as a leader in high-performance system cooling.
item.dc:creator: waynewilliams@onmail.com (Wayne Williams), TechRadar

item.title: Nearly half of National Weather Service offices have 20% vacancy rates, and experts say it's a risk
item.description: Data obtained by The Associated Press shows that close to half of the local National Weather Service forecast offices have 20% vacancy rates as severe weather chugs across the nation’s heartland.
item.dc:creator: Seth Borenstein, Associated Press, Local 4

item.title: How internet search algorithms could help critical infrastructure
item.description: Researchers found the algorithms that rank pages in internet searches also can help planners understand how to prevent failures in electrical systems. The post How internet search algorithms could help critical infrastructure first appeared on Federal News Network.
item.dc:creator: Tom Temin, Federal News Network

item.title: TikTok’s new owner stands to inherit 1,500 safety, privacy lawsuits
item.description: (Bloomberg) -- TikTok faces a mountain of litigation over child safety and privacy, a big risk for potential bidders vying to save the popular video app in the US.
item.dc:creator: Bloomberg, The Mercury News

item.title: A behind-the-scenes look at Nintendo Switch 2
item.description: NEW YORK (AP) — Nintendo's Switch 2 is bigger and better than its predecessor of eight years past as the video game developer pushes to bring its brand into “a new era" where social experiences are at the forefront.
item.dc:creator: RYAN KRYSKA, Associated Press, KREX 5

item.title: The future of AI search is Google’s to lose
item.description: When Google unveiled a new neural network design in 2017 called the Transformer architecture, it probably had no idea this would threaten Google Search’s dominance within seven years. When OpenAI applied Google’s Transformer architecture to generative language models, the GPT was born.
item.dc:creator: Computer World

item.title: Meta and UFC team up to bring AI and VR to fans
item.description: UFC is joining up with Facebook’s parent company Meta in a deal that will bring mixed martial arts to more fans around the world.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, Fast Company

item.title: Analysts: Trump tariffs 'worse than the worst case scenario' for tech investors
item.description: Analysts described President Trump’s latest slate of tariffs Wednesday as “worse than the worst case scenario” for tech investors.
item.dc:creator: Julia Shapero, The Hill

item.title: Judge blocks social media age-verification law in Arkansas
item.description: The Arkansas law would require people under 18 to only access certain sites with parental permission.
item.dc:creator: Lauren Irwin, NewsNation

item.title: IBM Cloud speeds AI workloads with Intel Gaudi 3 accelerators
item.description: IBM Cloud is broadening its AI technology services with Intel Gaudi 3 AI accelerators now available to enterprise customers.
item.dc:creator: Network World

item.title: NetBox Labs launches drift detection tool to tame configuration chaos
item.description: NetBox Labs this week made available a new product that will help network teams detect and remediate configuration drift across sophisticated network environments before costly service disruptions or unplanned downtime affect services or applications.
item.dc:creator: Network World

item.title: Google adds end-to-end email encryption to Gmail
item.description: Google has introduced a new end-to-end encryption (E2EE) feature in Gmail, enabling organizations to send encrypted emails that even Google cannot read to other Gmail users.
item.dc:creator: csoonline

item.title: Linux Foundation Networking shares new AI projects, milestone releases
item.description: The Linux Foundation’s networking division (LF Networking) is continuing to grow both its mandate and project roster in 2025.
item.dc:creator: Network World

item.title: Why no one is challenging Trump's executive order that keeps TikTok running
item.description: WASHINGTON (AP) — After TikTok was banned in the United States earlier this year, President Donald Trump gave the platform a reprieve, barreling past a law that was passed in Congress and upheld unanimously by the Supreme Court that said the ban was necessary for national security.
item.dc:creator: SARAH PARVINI and MARK SHERMAN, Associated Press, PIX 11

item.title: 15 ways to speed up Windows 11
item.description: Windows 11 does a lot under the hood to speed up a PC’s performance. The same PC will generally run faster on Windows 11 than Windows 10. But no matter how zippy your Windows 11 may be, it can run faster.
item.dc:creator: Computer World

item.title: Google’s new AI tech may know when your house will burn down
item.description: FireSat is a satellite project designed to detect and track wildfires early, aiming to detect a fire that's the size of a classroom within 20 minutes.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: HTMX and Alpine.js: How to combine two great, lean front ends
item.description: HTMX and Alpine are two low-overhead ways to empower your front end. Neither requires a build step, and both let you add Ajax-style API calls and client-side UI updates with minimal fuss.
item.dc:creator: Info World

item.title: Trump to hold a meeting on possible investors to buy TikTok with possible ban at stake
item.description: LOS ANGELES (AP) — President Donald Trump will hold a Wednesday meeting with aides about possible investors who could buy a stake in TikTok, a deal that could potentially stop the social media site from being banned in the United States.
item.dc:creator: SARAH PARVINI and JOSH BOAK, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Detroit production of Mozart opera turns its female characters into automatons
item.description: DETROIT (AP) — Audiences at the Detroit Opera House expecting their performance of “Cosi fan tutte" to begin with the overture may be surprised to hear instead a product launch from a tech company CEO.
item.dc:creator: MIKE SILVERMAN, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Dow wants to power its Texas manufacturing complex with new nuclear reactors instead of natural gas
item.description: Dow, a major producer of chemicals and plastics, wants to use next-generation nuclear reactors for clean power and steam at a Texas manufacturing complex instead of natural gas. Dow's subsidiary, Long Mott Energy, applied Monday to the U.S. Nuclear Regulatory Commission for a construction permit.
item.dc:creator: JENNIFER McDERMOTT, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Jack Black, Jason Momoa enter the Minecraft universe as the video game phenom hits the big screen
item.description: LOS ANGELES (AP) — When Jack Black got the call to star in the “Minecraft” movie, the perks were plenty. He got to work alongside Jason Momoa, reunite with “Nacho Libre” director Jared Hess and engulf himself into a beloved gaming universe.
item.dc:creator: JONATHAN LANDRUM Jr., Associated Press, ABC 4

item.title: DoD Modernization Exchange 2025: Savan Kong on building first Pentagon CX Office from the ground up
item.description: DoD’s former CXO shares details from the young office’s efforts to begin scaling customer experience across the department. The post DoD Modernization Exchange 2025: Savan Kong on building first Pentagon CX Office from the ground up first appeared on Federal News Network.
item.dc:creator: Anastasia Obis, Federal News Network

item.title: China's telecoms giant Huawei Technologies says its profit fell 28% while revenue surged in 2024
item.description: BANGKOK (AP) — Chinese telecoms gear giant Huawei said Monday its net profit fell 28% in 2024 while its revenue surged, as the company invested heavily in advanced technologies.
item.dc:creator: ELAINE KURTENBACH, Associated Press, KLAS, CBS News
